title: Kendra Koch: 'The Best Work Coming Out of Silicon Valley'
summary: Divergently founder and TEDx speaker Kendra Koch calls Incorruptible the best work coming out of Silicon Valley today, referencing Patagonia and Costco as proof that companies can do good while being successful.
blockquote: The best work coming out of Silicon Valley today is Eric Ries' new book, Incorruptible: Why Good Companies Go Bad.
